questions.question:
다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻으로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
When you set a goal, try to imagine it in detail.

다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻으로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
I like pizza and ice cream, so it’s not easy to lose weight.

다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻으로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
According to the weather forecast, it’ll rain this afternoon.
다음 중 두 단어의 의미 관계가 나머지 셋과 다른 것은?

마스크 판매 안내문에서 언급되지 않은 것은?
Information about mask sales
Each person can buy two masks per week.
◦ Time: 9 a.m. － 8 p.m.
◦ Place: at any pharmacy
◦ Price: 1,500 won each

빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
◦ I 	 travellin g by train.
◦ She looks 	 a model.

빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
◦ Let’s meet 	 10 o’clock.
◦ He is good 	 playing tennis.

빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
◦ 	 don’t we go hiking this weekend?
◦ 	 do you want to join the soccer club?

다음 중 밑줄 친 표현의 의미로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : Are you still writing your novel?
B : Yes, I’m still working on it. It takes a long time.
A : When do you think you will finish it?
B : In about 2 or 3 years.
A : Rome was not built in a day.
choices: ① 자신의 집보다 편한 곳은 없다.
③ 외모로 사람을 판단해서는 안 된다.
④ 오해받을 행동은 하지 말아야 한다.

questions.question:
다음 대화에서 알 수 있는 B의 심정으로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : Did you get the T-shirt you ordered?
B : Yes. I got it this morning.
A : Do you like it?
B : Yes, I love it. It really looks good on me.

다음 중 대화가 이루어지는 장소로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : Your hair is done! How do you like your haircut?
B : It’s okay, but still a bit too long.
A : Do you want me to make it shorter?
B : Yes, can you cut a little more on the sides?
A : Sure.

다음 중 밑줄 친 It(it)이 가리키는 것으로 가장 적절한 것은?
It is a traditional Korean house. It is made out of
natural materials, such as clay, wood, and stone, so it
is 	 eco-friendly. 	 Rooms 	 in 	 it 	 have 	 an 	 ondol 	 heating
system.

대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : There’s a problem with my computer.
B : 	 ?
A : The power button doesn’t work.
B : Okay. I’ll take a look at it.
choices: ② What is your dream job
③ What do you do for a living
④ What is he going to do next year

questions.question:
대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : Why are you moving to Incheon?
B : Because 	 .
choices: ① she is on a diet
② I got a job there
④ you should always wash your hands

questions.question:
다음 글을 쓴 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Come to Ocean Aquarium
Come 	 and 	 enjoy 	 many 	 strange, 	 beautiful 	 and
fascinating sea creatures. When you move through
the amazing underwater world of Ocean Aquarium,
you will see everything from starfish to sharks.

주어진 말에 이어질 두 사람의 대화를 <보기>에서 찾아
순서대로 가장 적절하게 배열한 것은?
What are you doing here?
<보기>
(A) Yes, I am. I’ve always been interested in them.
(B) I’m watching a grasshopper. Oh, look, it’s jumping!
(C) Yeah, it can jump really high. Are you interested
in insects?

다음 중 학교 도서관 이용에 관한 안내문 내용과 일치하지
않는 것은?
School Library
◦ All students can use the library.
◦ The library is open from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m.
◦ Students can borrow up to two books at a time.
◦ Food is not allowed in the library.
choices: ① 모든 학생들이 이용할 수 있다.
③ 한 번에 최대 다섯 권의 책을 대출할 수 있다.

questions.question:
경주 여행에 관한 다음 글에서 언급되지 않은 것은?
I went to Gyeongju with my family last fall. We
stayed at a hotel for three days. While staying there, we 	 visited 	 historical 	 places 	 such 	 as 	 Cheomseongdae
and Bulguksa. It was fantastic to actually see them.
The trip was exciting and unforgettable for me.
choices: ① 나는 지난 가을에 경주에 갔었다.
② 나는 경주에서 특산품을 사 왔다.
③ 나와 가족들은 역사적 장소를 방문했다.

questions.question:
다음 글의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
Seoul has one of the best subway systems in the
world. It’s clean, convenient, and efficient. The subway
lines are well connected, not only within the city, but
also to neighboring cities. Also, it’s easy to transfer
between the subway and the bus.
choices: ② 물을 아끼기 위한 실천 방법
③ 서울 지하철 요금이 싼 이유
④ 에너지 소비 효율을 높이는 방법

questions.question:
다음 글의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을
고르시오.
It is important to stay healthy. To keep your body
healthy, you must exercise regularly. Healthy activities
running, biking, swimming, and walking. It’s
recommended you exercise for at least 30 minutes a
day.

다음 글의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을
고르시오.
Some 	 foods 	 have 	 a 	 special 	 meaning 	 in 	 particular
cultures. 	 For 	 example, 	 noodles 	 are 	 considered 	 to 	 be
a(n) 	 of long life in Asia, because noodles are
long. Therefore, Asian people eat noodles on birthdays
and other special occasions to live a longer life.

다음 글의 바로 뒤에 이어질 내용으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Think of 	 the food you ate yesterday. 	 How many
colors did your food consist of? Food scientists say
eating fruits and vegetables of several different colors
every day is important for a healthy life. There are
many reasons for this.
choices: ① 제철 과일과 채소를 건강하게 조리하는 방법
② 다양한 색깔의 과일과 채소를 재배하는 방법
③ 제철 과일과 채소를 신선하게 보관해야 하는 이유
④ 다양한 색깔의 과일과 채소를 섭취해야 하는 이유

questions.question:
글의 흐름으로 보아, 다음 문장이 들어가기에 가장 적절한
곳은?
However, there are problems with online shopping as well.
Do you shop online often? ( ① ) If your answer to
this question is yes, why do you like online shopping?
( ② ) Many people say that they like online shopping
because it is convenient and it saves time. ( ③ ) The
biggest problems are late deliveries and orders sent to
the wrong address. ( ④ )

윗글의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
Tomorrow will be a car-free day downtown. All the
streets will be 	 to cars from 7 a.m. to 9 p.m. If
you plan to go downtown, please leave your car at home
and 	 use public 	 transportation. 	 On the car-free streets, you can walk or ride bikes. Various free events, such as dance and music performances, will be held.

윗글의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
Tomorrow will be a car-free day downtown. All the
streets will be 	 to cars from 7 a.m. to 9 p.m. If
you plan to go downtown, please leave your car at home
and 	 use public 	 transportation. 	 On the car-free streets, you can walk or ride bikes. Various free events, such as dance and music performances, will be held.
choices: ④ 차 없는 날 행사에 대한 안내
